KEEN NOSE: Sniffs out nearby small chests.
You pet Arlo. He licks your hand excitedly.
As you pull out one of the books from the shelf,
you notice a \ii[2] that was placed behind it.
You have no idea how it got there, but you pick
The good 'ol cabinet crammed with stuff

An old cookbook that \N[2] found laying around.
a few things back in the day!
\p2It's time to dig in. I just finished up a
delicious meal: mashed potatoes with carrots,
a fresh salad, and sparkling water tapped
straight from the mountains of Verdin Village!
\p2Let's eat before the food gets cold! Would
anyone like to speak before we chow down?
\p3Yes, in fact. I'd like to give a quick prayer to
Trailia before we eat. To bless this meal, to thank
her for guiding us thus far, and to give us the
best of luck as we set out to Telluria.
\p3Trailia, please give us the tools we need to find
\c[18]Apocalypse\c[0], and stop his reign of terror!
\p3\N[2], you're actually a really good cook.
\p2Heh, thanks guys. What can I say...
\p4That was fantastic, \N[2]! Thank you so much!
perfect way to prepare us before stepping foot
onto Tellurian soil for the first time.
\p4I... I'm not sure. I'm happy to be sitting here,
eating great food with great people. But...
I can't help but think about everything
\p4I was stuck in that cell when I met you guys... and
now look where I am. With a team of experienced
adventurers, getting wrapped up in worldwide
business I could never have dreamed about.
\p4I never expected to get this far in life, but now
that it's really happening, I can't help but think about
everything I'm leaving behind. It's... not easy to leave
the place you've lived in all your life.
\p4To be honest, a part of me still feels like
I don't belong anywhere else but the Bandito
Hideout. It was a dump... but it was home.
\p2Hey, I get it. I spent my whole life in Verdin Village.
It's weird to know you'll be away from home for so long.
But that's just part of growing up, ain't it?
be so hung up on the past. There's a little
bit of trauma thrown in there too... but
there's no point in unpacking all that.
there's someone I've been looking for.
\p4I... I'm still searching for him. And
who knows? He may be in Telluria. I've
been searching Adon for so long... but
maybe I'm on the wrong continent.
\p4The only way I'll really be able to make peace
with myself is if I go on the journey I never
imagined I'd take. And that goes for all of us!
\p4We're out of our comfort zones, but that's alright.
We can take whatever The Trail throws at us,
\p4And if \c[18]Apocalypse\c[0] dares to get in our way...
\p2Hell yeah! Let's do this, team... uh, do we have a team name?
\p3\N[19]! In the name of Trailia and all that is holy,
we stand for righteousness, and the eradication of evil!
\p2\N[1], the Village Headman came around here earlier
today and asked about you. He needs to see you at the
church before you finally set out for Telluria.
Meet us outside town afterwards, will ya'?

FELINE INSTINCT: 15% chance to start battle with advantage.
You pet Clover. She purrs and rubs her cheek against your arm.
Who are you, and what are you doing in my house?
Who are you, and what are you doing in my house?
\n<Pet Keeper>Hello, \N[1]! Your brother is planning on
getting some pets soon, so he hired me to watch
over them, on account of the fact that you two
take such long trips away from home so often.
\n<Pet Keeper>Of course, since this is your house too, I can
watch over any pets you get! I can also help
if you'd like to leave a pet here.
like to leave a pet here?
You don't have a pet with you.
